name: Feast Medium
description: Figures around a table laden with food — the warmth of shared abundance.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Medium shot of a feast, figures gathered around a loaded table in animated conversation.
{setting}. A banquet scene mid-meal, hands gesturing, plates passing, faces animated.
{setting}. Mid-range view of a celebratory feast, the table alive with abundance and camaraderie.

2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left.
3: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left.

background_pool: Long wooden table overflowing with platters of food, goblets and candles, hung tapestries on the walls behind
Banquet hall with rows of dishes, wine pitchers, and fruit cascading across a cloth-draped surface, torchlight flickering
Rustic feast setting with a rough-hewn table piled high, hanging dried herbs, and warm light spilling from wall sconces
action_pool: one arm gesturing broadly outward, palm up
leaning toward their neighbor, head tilted attentively
both hands animated, fingers splayed mid-story
chin propped on one hand, elbow on the surface
head thrown back mid-laugh, shoulders bouncing
leaning back, one arm draped casually behind them
leaning forward, both forearms resting on the surface
one hand raised, finger pointing upward emphatically
torso turned toward their neighbor, one elbow raised
